text:
Top 5 stories on Hacker News:

| Title | Points | Source |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan | 1147 | [stepsecurity.io](https://www.stepsecurity.io/blog/axios-compromised-on-npm-malicious-versions-drop-remote-access-trojan) |
| Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban | 596 | [sambent.com](https://www.sambent.com/the-white-house-app-has-huawei-spyware-and-an-ice-tip-line/) |
| Do your own writing | 613 | [alexhwoods.com](https://alexhwoods.com/dont-let-ai-write-for-you/) |
| Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry | 570 | [twitter.com](https://twitter.com/Fried_rice/status/2038894956459290963) |
| Artemis II is not safe to fly | 484 | [idlewords.com](https://idlewords.com/2026/03/artemis_ii_is_not_safe_to_fly.htm) |

formats.prompt: Extract the top 5 stories from the front page. For each story, provide the title and the number of points. Provide the source URL for each story.
